title: Forever Faithful

sections.label: Intro
lines: (A D G Em)
Let the heavens sing of Your wondrous love,
A melody carved in the stars above.

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: (G C Am D)
Your steadfast love endures through time,
A covenant made in mercy's rhyme.
You spoke the promise, Your voice so true,
"David’s throne shall rest in You."

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: (D G C D)
Though the skies may turn, the earth may shake,
Your word remains for every heart's sake.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: (C G D Em)
Faithful forever, Your love never fades,
Through the trials of time, Your mercy cascades.
The heavens declare it, the stars hold it true,
Faithful forever, O Lord, we praise You.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: (G C Am D)
The waves may roar, the mountains fall,
Yet Your justice reigns, sovereign over all.
Blessed are those who walk in Your light,
Their hearts rejoice in Your name's delight.

sections.label: Bridge
lines: (Am G D Em)
When shadows fall, and hope feels thin,
Your faithfulness calls us back again.
A shield, a rock, our guiding flame,
Forever we trust in Your holy name.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: (C G D Em)
Faithful forever, Your love never fades,
Through the trials of time, Your mercy cascades.
The heavens declare it, the stars hold it true,
Faithful forever, O Lord, we praise You.

sections.label: Outro
lines: (A D G Em)
Let the heavens sing of Your wondrous love,
A melody carved in the stars above.

epigraph: and as a faithful witness in heaven. Selah
